name: GitHub
summary: Read repos, manage issues + PRs, and see CI status from inside ClaudeFather.
description: Gives agents access to GitHub -- search code, read files, open/triage issues and pull requests, check CI/Actions -- so they can answer 'what changed', 'what's failing', and 'open a PR for this fix' without leaving the control center. Uses GitHub's official MCP server (remote OAuth, or a local fine-grained-PAT server for headless).

requires.label: A GitHub account with access to the target repos (remote = browser OAuth; local/headless = a fine-grained PAT)
